actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour id=314576056 (script guid=27b31662383b39d4a9c98eb14ed39152) attached to GameObject 'ClockText'. Initial state finished=false; Update() accumulates time via Time.deltaTime and updates TextMeshPro (fileID=314576054). This action waits to accumulate a non-zero time, then invokes onTimeOut() to stop the clock (sets finished=true). No m_Calls defined in scene; manual trigger required.

MonoBehaviour id=314576056 (script guid=27b31662383b39d4a9c98eb14ed39152) attached to GameObject 'ClockText'. After previous timeout, time remains at the accumulated value; invoking onFinish() calls BestTime.checkTime(time) on BestTime reference (fileID=1936206876) and sets finished=true. Ensures coverage of BestTime.checkTime() call path.
